nasb.text: Then Ezra rose from before the house of God and went into the chamber of Jehohanan the son of Eliashib. Although he went there, he did not eat bread nor drink water, for he was mourning over the unfaithfulness of the exiles.

esv.text: Then Ezra withdrew from before the house of God and went to the chamber of Jehohanan the son of Eliashib, where he spent the night, neither eating bread nor drinking water, for he was mourning over the faithlessness of the exiles.

cnv.text: 以斯拉就從　神的殿前起來，走進以利亞實的兒子約哈難的屋裡去；他在那裡不吃飯，也不喝水，因為他為了被擄歸回的人的不忠而悲傷。

ccb.text: 以斯拉从上帝的殿前起来，进了以利亚实的儿子约哈难的房间。他在那里不吃不喝，为流亡归来者的不忠而忧伤。
